title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
